title: Basalt GUI [DARK]
description: GUI that don't burn your eyes! Oh wait... I think it rhymed! I wonder why!
body:
![Basalt GUI endrVlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40cdcf7c88060ba118dc537d6c522077e36fc8a.png)
## **Basalt GUI**
- Basalt GUI overhauls the dogwater, regular light mode.
- **Includes changes for containers, HUD, buttons, etc.**
- Hope you guys like it!
## **Compatible Mod[s] That Work (I'll maybe add some more)**
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Rasied Mod [Raises the Hotbar]](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)

# _**Example:**_
